calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt Of Deposit Of Money Into Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Compromise of Disputed Claim of a Person with a Disability.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Conor M. Kelly Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Kenneth Loye husband and Guardian ad litem for Susan R. Loye a person with a disability.
Order granting petitioner and claimant's request of exemption from CRC 7.952 on file.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $400,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $94,680.22 payable to Law Firm of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitoner's attorney in the total amount of $21,279.10
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, (1) Payee: Ingenix Subrogation Services 75 Remihance Drive, Suite 6019 Chicago, IL 60675-6019 in the amount of $50,000.00.
(2) Payee: MSPRC (Medicare) P.O. Box 138832 Oaklahoma, OK 73113 in the amount of $145,305.90 Total amount of $195,305.90

A net balance of $88,734.78 to be paid directly from Counsel's Trust Account to the "Susan R. Loye Special Needs Trust." Any disbursement thereafter shall be in accord with the terms of the trust instrument. The Trust Agreement was entered into on April 12, 2010 by and between Kenneth T. Loye guardian of Susan Loye, Cayahoga County Probate Case #2010GDN15516. A copy of the Trust is attached to Order as attachment 7(c)(2)(b).
Status Hearing Scheduled on 2/28/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money in compliance with Court's Order. No appearance is required if the
receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
